acquisition method: MS data were acquired using a data-dependent top 10 method
alkylation reagent: 100 μl iodoacetamide (IAA) buffer (50 mM IAA in UA buffer)
collision energy: The normalized collision energy was 35 eV
instrument: connected to an Orbitrap Elite hybrid mass spectrometer
labeling: A total of 1582 proteins were identified in the iTRAQ experiment
